posts.text:
I wrote the CARING for Our Veterans Act to ensure our veterans receive the best standard of care. It will enhance how community care providers share medical records with VA medical centers. 

I'm excited that it passed out of @SVACGOP unanimously yesterday!

posts.text:
Happy National Ag week! Agriculture is the heart and soul of Nebraska. When we invest in our young farmers and ranchers, we're securing the future of the safest and most abundant food supply in the world.

We supported this future in the Working Families Tax Cuts with an extension of the Beginning Farmer and Rancher Development Benefit and a permanent Death Tax exemption. This helps young farmers and ranchers start their own operation or take over the family business.

posts.text:
Only American citizens should vote in our elections. 

This is common sense and it is consistent with the work I did as Governor of Nebraska. Nebraskans passed a law requiring voter ID. The ballot initiative passed overwhelmingly, 65-35. Nebraskans supported having secure elections then and they support it now.  

I’m proud to support the SAVE America Act.

posts.text:
The wildfires in Western Nebraska are the largest since Nebraska became a state.
 
My office is here to help amid this historic disaster.
 
For those harmed by the wildfires, the USDA Farm Service Agency Disaster Assistance Program may be able to help.
 
It’s important to document any damages and report them to USDA to ensure assistance.
 
We are happy to answer questions and help Nebraskans impacted by the fire navigate the process.

The website can be found here: fsa.usda.gov/resources/progr…

posts.text: Photos from my flyover of the wildfires impacting Western Nebraska. The largest in Nebraska history since becoming a state. I am continuing to pray for those affected by this disaster.
posts.quote: Photos from my flyover of the wildfires impacting Western Nebraska. The largest in Nebraska history since becoming a state. I am continuing to pray for those affected by this disaster.

posts.text:
An important and necessary action taken by Governor Pillen. I continue to monitor and receive updates on these fires. My prayers are with those affected by them and the brave first responders trying to put them out.


Governor Jim Pillen (@TeamPillen)

Today, I declared a state of emergency within Morrill, Garden, Arthur, Keith, Lincoln, Dawson, and Frontier Counties to help combat wildfires.

This proclamation allows the Nebraska Adjutant General, who also serves as State Disaster Coordinator,

posts.text:
The Working Families Tax Cuts supports the next generation of ag leaders. Whether taking over the family business or starting their own operation, it encourages young Nebraskans to enter the ag industry.

We strengthened the Beginning Farmer and Rancher Development Benefit. We extended its coverage from five years to ten years. That gives new producers access to critical risk management tools for longer.
